title: GlobalLink Translation Entry
description: Schema describing a translatable string entry as exposed by the GlobalLink Strings REST API at api.globallinkstrings.com/v1/api.

key.description: Stable identifier for the translatable string within a project.

language.description: BCP-47 language tag identifying the locale of this entry value (for example, en-US, ja-JP, de-DE).

value.description: Translated or source string content for the entry.

branch.description: Optional branch identifier scoping the entry within a branching project.

tags.description: Tags associated with the entry, used to filter pushes, pulls, and orders.

description.description: Human-readable description or developer note providing context for translators.

screenshotIds.description: References to screenshots that provide visual context for this entry.

status.description: Current state of the entry in the translation workflow.

characterLimit.description: Optional maximum character count enforced for the translated value.

plural.description: Whether the entry uses plural form variants.

pluralForms.description: Plural variant values keyed by CLDR plural category.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the entry was first created in the project.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the most recent modification to the entry.

metadata.description: Arbitrary integrator-supplied metadata associated with the entry.
